news.t: KAT and GKAT Leap into Market with approximately $890 Million, Largest Active Equity ETF Launch of 2025

holdings.infoBox: GKAT is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Brookfield stock at 6.22%, Franco-Nevada at 4.72%, McKesson at 4.47%, Samsung Electronics at 4.22%, and Novartis AG ADR at 4.03%.

overview.description: The Scharf Global Opportunity ETF (GKAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of equity securities from around the world. The funds investment approach combines fundamental research with quantitative analysis. GKAT was launched on Oct 14, 2014 and is issued by Scharf.

data.title: KAT and GKAT Leap into Market with approximately $890 Million, Largest Active Equity ETF Launch of 2025
data.text: Scharf Converts Flagship Mutual Funds into ETFs, Extending Firm's Over 40-Year Track Record of Value Investing LOS GATOS, Calif. , Aug. 26, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Scharf ETF (Ticker: KAT) and the Scharf...
